queue.title: Live Queue
queue.notInQueue: You are not in any queue yet
queue.missedQueueAlert: You missed your queue number. Please re-register at Counter 3.
queue.rescheduleConfirmMsg: You'll receive a reminder 30 minutes before your slot. Please proceed to Level 1, Pharmacy A.
queue.proceedToPharmacy: Please proceed to Level 1, Pharmacy A
queue.notifyWhenCalled: You will be notified when your number is called.
queue.queueExpiredNotice: has expired. A new number will be issued at the next available slot.

urgency.title: What does your letter mean?
urgency.A: Priority A — Urgent. You will be attended to first.
urgency.B: Priority B — Moderate. You will be seen shortly.
urgency.C: Priority C — Routine. Please wait for your turn.

medications.title: My Medications
medications.scanSubtitle: Scan medication labels from photo or short video for clearer identification
medications.statusReadyNotice: Your medications are ready for collection.
medications.statusPackingNotice: Some medications are still being prepared.
medications.statusDelayedNotice: {{medication}} is delayed and still being prepared.
medications.scanFeature1: Explain any label section from photo or video you are unsure about
medications.scanFeature2: See what the detected medication from your scan is commonly used for
medications.scanFeature3: Hear instructions, side effects, and precautions aloud from scan results.
medications.chatDesc: Chat in your preferred language. Ask about your medications, side effects, dosage, pharmacy opening hours, or any health questions you have.
medications.tapToScan: Use your camera to capture a photo/video or upload a file for quick label explanations and medication guidance
medications.featureIdentifyDesc: Scan one sticker, warning, or full label and get it explained in plain language
medications.featureTranslateDesc: See what the detected medication does, how to take it, and key safety notes
medications.featureTtsDesc: Play each result aloud, or read the full guidance from top to bottom
medications.tipsCameraTitle: Tips for Live Camera (Photo or Video)
medications.tipsUploadTitle: Tips for Uploading Photo or Video
medications.tipsCardBody: Open a short guide only when you need it.
medications.scanAnalyzingDesc: Pilly is reading the label, explaining the scanned section, and preparing a medication summary in your selected language.
medications.scanDetectedTextEmpty: No readable text was detected on the label.
medications.scanNoWarnings: No warning text was clearly visible in this image.
medications.scanNoLabelMeaning: We could not clearly explain this part of the label from the photo.
medications.scanNoOverview: General medication information is only shown when the medicine name is clear in the scan.
medications.scanNoHowToTake: No reliable how-to-take guidance is available from this scan.
medications.scanNoSideEffects: No reliable side-effect guidance is available from this scan.
medications.scanNoPrecautions: No extra precautions could be confirmed from this scan.
medications.scanNoStorage: No storage guidance could be confirmed from this scan.
medications.scanOverviewNote: This is general medication information. Always follow your own label and your pharmacist's instructions.
medications.scanReviewFallback: Some parts of the label were unclear, so a pharmacist should review it if you are unsure.
medications.scanReadAllHint: Play Scan Results, Summary, Directions, and Warning
medications.scanAudioError: We couldn't play the audio right now. Please try again.
medications.scanLanguageChanged: Your current language has changed. Scan again to refresh the translation in
medications.scanNoDirections: No clear dosage instructions were visible in this image.
medications.scanNoResult: No clear medication details could be extracted from this image.
medications.scanGenericError: We couldn't scan this label clearly. Please try another photo.
medications.scanCameraLiveDesc: Use Capture Photo for one clear label frame, or Record Video to scan around the bottle/box. Keep text sharp and steady before confirming.
medications.scanCameraError: We couldn't open the camera. Please allow camera access or upload a photo instead.
medications.scanCameraNotReady: The camera is still getting ready. Please wait a moment and try again.
medications.scanUseUploadInstead: Upload a photo or video instead
medications.scanUnsupportedFile: Please upload a photo (JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP) or a short video (MP4, WEBM, MOV) of the medication label.
medications.scanFileTooLarge: This photo is larger than 10MB. Please upload a smaller image.
medications.scanVideoTooLarge: This video is larger than 25MB. Please upload a smaller video.
medications.tipCamera1: Choose Capture Photo for one label section, or Record Video to show multiple sides of the medicine.
medications.tipCamera2: Before capturing, center the label text in frame and keep the phone steady.
medications.tipCamera3: After capture/record, preview first and confirm only when the text is readable.
medications.tipCamera4: Avoid glare, shadows, and blurred motion over medicine name, dosage, warnings, and expiry.
medications.tipUpload1: Upload a clear photo or short video based on your goal: one section or the full package.
medications.tipUpload2: For full medication guidance, include the full bottle/box label or a short video covering all sides.
medications.tipUpload3: Use clear focus and lighting so name, dosage, side effects, precautions, and storage text can be read.
medications.tipUpload4: Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, MP4, WEBM, MOV. Photo limit: 10MB. Video limit: 25MB.
medications.scanEasyStep1: 1. Choose Open Camera (photo/video) or Upload Photo/Video.
medications.scanEasyStep2: 2. Keep label text clear with bright lighting and steady framing.
medications.scanEasyStep3: 3. Preview and confirm, then wait for results and tap Read Aloud if needed.
medications.medDefaultInstructions: Take exactly as prescribed on your medication label.

chat.title: Ask Pilly
chat.subtitle: Get answers to your medication questions
chat.escalateNotice: A pharmacist will respond during working hours (Mon–Fri, 8am–6pm)
chat.suggestionOne: Hi Pilly, can you introduce yourself?
chat.suggestionTwo: Where can I check my queue status?
chat.suggestionThree: What time does the pharmacy close today?
chat.suggestionFour: Can you review this pill-taking video for safety risks?
chat.suggestionFive: I feel dizzy after taking my tablets. Is this serious?
chat.cameraCaptureDesc: Capture a photo or record a short video for medication questions and guidance.
chat.attachUnsupported: Please attach an image or video file.
chat.attachTooLarge: Attachment is larger than 25MB. Please upload a smaller file.
chat.cameraNotSupported: Camera is not supported in this browser.
chat.cameraOpenError: Unable to open camera. Please check camera permissions.
chat.cameraNotReady: The camera is still getting ready. Please try again.
chat.cameraRecordError: Unable to start recording on this device.
chat.voiceError: Unable to transcribe audio. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.logoutDesc: You will need to log in again to check your queue status.
profile.languageHint: You can change this later in Profile or using the globe icon in the top-right corner.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.medicationReady: Your medication is ready for collection
notifications.queueCalled: Your queue number has been called

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

meds.metformin_how: Take 1 tablet twice daily with meals. Do not skip doses.
meds.metformin_caution: May cause stomach upset if taken without food. Swallow whole, do not crush or chew.
meds.lisinopril_how: Take 1 tablet once daily in the morning. Monitor blood pressure regularly.
meds.lisinopril_caution: Do not stop taking without consulting your doctor, even if you feel well.
meds.atorvastatin_how: Take 1 tablet once daily at bedtime. Avoid grapefruit juice.
meds.atorvastatin_caution: Avoid grapefruit juice. Report any unexplained muscle pain or weakness to your doctor.
meds.aspirin_how: Take 1 tablet once daily after breakfast with a full glass of water.

errors.incorrectCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
